# settings

**Instance Property**

A dictionary with preset setting values and group objects as keys.

## Declaration

```swift
var settings: [String : PHASEGroupPresetSetting] { get }
```

## Discussion

This property defines the settings and the engine’s [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEEngine/groups] that receive the settings.
title: settings
